name: Barbecue Sauce
snippet: I wanted to share with you a quick, tasty and Clean Barbecue Sauce that I developed.  Store bought barbecue sauces are full of added sugars, preservatives and chemicals.  I don’t know about you, but I feel much better knowing what I am putting in my body.  I created a clean version using fresh ingredients that takes literally 20 minutes to make.  Try it out the next time you fire up the grill!
